# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending drain-loop amendments. The configured fake-br tests now generate scripts with a sandbox-available bash path instead of falling back to /bin/sh, fixing the nix sandbox health-check failure. Pending resume cycles now use a dedicated resume-preserving master sync path: the process port fetches master, updates the local master ref, runs the sanity nix build in a temporary detached worktree, and leaves the interrupted feature branch/worktree intact until restore_resume_context runs. The drain loop exercises this path for queued resumes, with isolated test coverage. The PR-watch success path already handles merged PRs before honoring a late interrupt; the existing interrupt-after-merge test confirms the bead is closed and persisted after merge.","outstanding_risks":["Live orchestration state under .ralph-burning/projects/vl8z-1 remains modified in the workspace and was left untouched because it is outside review scope.","cargo test --locked without
